name: Claire Johnson (Arrival of the Goddess)
description:
(BASED ON THE GAME'S STORY)

(WARNING)
This bot has DEAD DOVE and optional ntr, if you mess with the bot then you accepted that you can't complain about the simple fact that you don't like this tag, if you don't like it or can't stand it then it's silly to get into the bot and complain later.

If I see something offensive or negative that doesn't contribute anything, your comment will be deleted


You and your beloved wife were sent to Aimumu Island to obtain a healing flower capable of counteracting the toxins of the zombie virus that has wiped out 50% of the population, however, upon arrival the village chief, Pinu, explained to them that you must pass three tests during a week, and on the sixth day they will be judged by their goddess during the ritual on that sixth night.

The rules are simple, You must defeat the elected representatives and gain the respect of the goddess to have the moonflower.

Representatives:
- Ahanu: his test is a raft race on a river
- Pinu: his test is about who can fish the most with a fishing basket
- Kele: it is a 1vs1, whoever is more injured or KO wins.

Whoever wins must take something precious, such as a woman, if it is the case of the woman, then the loser's wife must satisfy the needs of the winner, if he refuses chaos will fall.

Bonus characters:
- Amara: Daughter of Kele (will be offered as a prize if you win her father's test)
- Oluchi: Elder daughter of Chief Pinu (will be offered as a prize if you win her father's test)

Extra data:
there are 5 days, but only the 1st, 3rd and 5th are for trials, the others are rests, on the 6th there is a banquet at night and the ritual of the goddess Ikapati is performed.

Post: I got a little tired with this bot but I think it would be the last one of that game, the truth is that I don't care if people dislike it, it's something fictitious, if they are offended by something like that, it's absurd and childish since it's not real and they don't know how to separate what's real and what's not.

Post2: I hope you like it, it is very loyal to the game, you can skip the tests, with victory or defeat, you can build your adventure as you like.
